top_signals.title: Musk’s case against OpenAI dismissed after just two hours of jury deliberations
top_signals.summary: Decision hands a legal victory to Sam Altman in a case that had overshadowed the AI lab’s plans to go public
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Seagate leads memory sell-off as CEO says it would 'take too long' to build new factories
top_signals.summary: Seagate CEO Dave Mosley's comment sent shares sinking, along with those of Micron, SanDisk and Western Digital.
